name: MatrixFactory
summary: The MatrixFactory class provides a convenient way to generate different kinds of transformation matrices.

methods.name: ByCoordinateSystems
methods.signature: public static Matrix ByCoordinateSystems(CoordinateSystem CoordSys1, CoordinateSystem CoordSys2)
methods.summary: Returns a coordinate transformation matrix defined by two coordinate systems. With the returned matrix points can be transformed from the first coordinate system to the second coordinate system. The ByCoordinateSystems method is meant for transforming points between coordinate systems asked in the same work plane.

params.name: CoordSys1
params.doc: The coordinate system to start from.

returns.doc: The transformation matrix defined by the two coordinate systems.

methods.name: FromCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns a coordinate transformation matrix defined by the given coordinate system. With the returned matrix points can be transformed from the given coordinate system to the current work plane coordinate system.

params.name: CoordSys
params.doc: The coordinate system to transform points from.

returns.doc: The transformation matrix defined by the given coordinate system.

methods.name: Rotate
methods.signature: public static Matrix Rotate(double Angle, Vector Axis)
methods.summary: Returns a rotation matrix in a Clockwise rotation around the given rotation axis, defined by the given angle and the given rotation axis.

methods.name: ToCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns a coordinate transformation matrix defined by the given coordinate system. With the returned matrix points can be transformed from the current work plane coordinate system to the given coordinate system.

params.name: CoordSys
params.doc: The coordinate system to transform points to.

returns.doc: The transformation matrix defined by the given coordinate system.
